mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, movie_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, movie_id, rating, content, created_at, updated_at FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, movie_id, rating, content, created_at, updated_at FROM reviews WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT r.id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS userName FROM reviews r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
